name: Biden-Harris 2020
subject: Official Focus Group Invite for Peter Willis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We're launching a new Biden-Harris 2020 focus group to help establish our strategy now that our ticket is complete. |
---
Hi Peter --

Kamala Harris has officially joined the ticket as Joe Biden's running mate, and it's clear people are ecstatic.

And now that Kamala is officially on the ticket, **we want to know what our top supporters think Joe and Kamala should focus on.**

So we're launching a new Biden-Harris 2020 focus group to help establish our strategy now that our ticket is complete, and we'd love to get your feedback today, Peter.

[**Please participate in our focus group, it will only take a few minutes of your time, and we 'd really appreciate your input >>**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb90/1cd0ac28/16258c424/357e18fe/1034426232/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/surv-official-biden-harris-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.08.13_B4_focusgroup_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.08.13_B4_focusgroup_X__F1_S1_C1__ac") | **Enter the official Biden-Harris 2020 Focus Group!**
**Name: **Peter Willis
**Date Invited:** 8/13/20
**Estimated Time To Complete:** 1-5 minutes
---
| [ENTER THE FOCUS GROUP >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb90/1cd0ac28/16258c424/357e18fd/1034426232/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/surv-official-biden-harris-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.08.13_B4_focusgroup_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.08.13_B4_focusgroup_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")
---
Peter, we really hope that you will be one of the grassroots supporters who participate in our focus group, so we hope you'll take a few minutes to share your thoughts.

**Simply click the link below to get started. We 're looking forward to hearing your opinions!**

[**https://go.joebiden.com/Biden-Harris-Focus-Group**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb90/1cd0ac28/16258c424/357e18fe/1034426232/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/surv-official-biden-harris-focus-group?source=JB_EM_SURV_2020.08.13_B4_focusgroup_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_SURV_2020.08.13_B4_focusgroup_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")

Thank you,
Biden-Harris 2020
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb90/1cd0ac28/16258c424/357e18fc/1034426232/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb90/1cd0ac28/16258c424/357e18fb/1034426232/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb90/1cd0ac28/16258c424/357e18fa/1034426232/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb90/1cd0ac28/16258c424/357e18f9/1034426232/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb90/1cd0ac28/16258c424/357e18f8/1034426232/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb90/1cd0ac28/16258c424/357e18f7/1034426232/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb90/1cd0ac28/16258c424/357e18f5/1034426232/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and Kamala Harris's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb90/1cd0ac28/16258c424/357e18f4/1034426232/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE AND KAMALA »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb90/1cd0ac28/16258c424/357e18f3/1034426232/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb90/1cd0ac28/16258c424/357e18f6/1034426232/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb90/1cd0ac28/16258c424/357e18f2/1034426232/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb90/1cd0ac28/16258c424/357e18f5/1034426232/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb90/1cd0ac28/16258c424/357e18f1/1034426232/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: Josh Hicks
subject: We just launched our first TV ad of the campaign! Watch it now and, if you can, chip in to help keep our ads up.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
Without being able to connect with voters in person, TV and digital ads are going to be the best way to get the word out about our campaign. Grassroots, online donors are the backbone of our campaign and thanks to your support our first TV ad just went up yesterday, take a look!

|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18677994/236306191/1896069278?refcode=FL_em_fr_20200814TVad1_JH_all_xx_xx_atest_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTM3OGYzZC0yOWRlLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5QRU5AtdxSjuf860ga5yRQTV5vmUwR2lNoaVbAjsTfQ=)
| | We just don’t have enough members of Congress who know what it’s like to be poor. Not enough folks who know what it’s like to struggle to put food on the table or pay health insurance premiums. **I know because I’ve worked hard and still been poor.** But I think with folks like me in Washington fighting for the people in our district, we can do some good. That’s what our first television ad of the campaign is all about. I’m running to bring real representation back to this district, and bring the voices of regular folks in Kentucky’s 6th District to Congress. [_**You can watch our first TV ad here. clean_body: Without being able to connect with voters in person, TV and digital ads are going to be the best way to get the word out about our campaign. Grassroots, online donors are the backbone of our campaign and thanks to your support our first TV ad just went up yesterday, take a look! | = | | We just don’t have enough members of Congress who know what it’s like to be poor. Not enough folks who know what it’s like to struggle to put food on the table or pay health insurance premiums. I know because I’ve worked hard and still been poor. But I think with folks like me in Washington fighting for the people in our district, we can do some good. That’s what our first television ad of the campaign is all about. I’m running to bring real representation back to this district, and bring the voices of regular folks in Kentucky’s 6th District to Congress. = = | | = Grassroots, online donors are the backbone of our campaign, and with your support we’re running a race that folks can be proud of. I’m not taking corporate PAC money — we truly rely on your support to keep this campaign going. Ours is an important message, and it’s one that more folks need to hear. Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us.

name: Corky Messner
subject: Day of Action coming up TOMORROW
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
It’s last call for volunteers for our special Day of Action tomorrow. Are you in? >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/082699297c53fba2/8228add4e9ab133cc3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, You've probably seen the earlier emails about our special Day of Action tomorrow, August 15th, but I wanted to send you one more note to let you know it’s not too late to join us! We’re doing a last call for volunteers for tomorrow. We’ve had a great response already, but we are still looking for a few more patriots in New Hampshire to step up! We’ve almost hit our goal to round out our 200-person roster of volunteers — will you be our 200th? Consider coming to spend your Saturday with us, being around other freedom-loving individuals, and making a difference in taking back our country. It is through supporters and volunteers like you that we’re going to win this seat from D.C. Jeanne Shaheen, and bring some commonsense, conservative leadership to the Granite State! If you have even just a few hours to knock on doors or make phone calls tomorrow, I’d be honored to have you on board. **Please[CLICK HERE](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/082699297c53fba2/ebb894e3a25a640ec3d6b838967d376c/33153) to sign up, and our field director Ryan Nichols will reach out to you personally for more details**. Hope to see you tomorrow! -Corky Messner [SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/082699297c53fba2/222e71317aef3dd7c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/082699297c53fba2/4c1395524107504bc3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/082699297c53fba2/05c96f027e5a7ea2c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

name: Mary & the TNDP Team
subject: Rise, Shine, and Democratic Grind
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/DNC%20BREAKFASTS%20%281%29.png]
Dear Peter,

It's no question 2020 has been a year of firsts, and the Democratic National Convention is no exception. In this historic election year, the convention will be held remotely, which means YOU CAN ATTEND ALL THE EVENTS [https://tndp.org/2020-dnc-breakfasts/] !
Every four years, the delegation from Tennessee travels to the convention where every morning they attend a breakfast that features a leader from the Democratic Party. During this unprecedented convention year, all events are virtual, which allows Democrats from across the state and country to join the Tennessee delegation at these special events.

We've lined up some amazing breakfast speakers who will be sure to fire us up. Check out the guest speakers and PURCHASE YOUR TICKETS TODAY! [https://tndp.org/2020-dnc-breakfasts/]

Monday Breakfast
• U.S. Representative Maxine Waters (CA)
• U.S. House Democratic Caucus Chair Hakeem Jeffries (NY)

Tuesday Breakfast
• U.S. Senator Carol Moseley Braun (IL)
• U.S. Senator Sherrod Brown (OH)
• U.S. Senator Heidi Heitkamp (ND)
• State Representative London Lamar

Wednesday Breakfast
• U.S. Attorney General Eric Holder
• U.S. Representative Rosa DeLauro (CT)
• U.S. Representative Sharice Davids (KS)

Thursday Breakfast
• Democratic Presidential Candidate Andrew Yang

clean_body: [] Dear Peter, It's no question 2020 has been a year of firsts, and the Democratic National Convention is no exception. In this historic election year, the convention will be held remotely, which means YOU CAN ATTEND ALL THE EVENTS [] ! Every four years, the delegation from Tennessee travels to the convention where every morning they attend a breakfast that features a leader from the Democratic Party. During this unprecedented convention year, all events are virtual, which allows Democrats from across the state and country to join the Tennessee delegation at these special events. We've lined up some amazing breakfast speakers who will be sure to fire us up. Check out the guest speakers and PURCHASE YOUR TICKETS TODAY! Dear Friend, "We cannot solve our problems with the same thinking we used when we created them." _\- Albert Einstein_ It's as simple as that. My opponent, Pete Sessions, spent decades in Congress representing Dallas until constituents fired him. A few months ago, after a half-century of living elsewhere, Dallas Pete moved to Waco to try to find a way back in and resume his hyper-partisan brand of politics. I'm often asked what I think I can do to ease the divisiveness in Congress. I've got a plan - [you can check it out here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18683794/236395230/-944697012?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmY2NWMyZi00N2RlLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AdmttSXZ98MCH0eMcmTZ_InuRZNvuf3XA3TCvnA_7ZU=&emci=f8948f02-59dd-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=dbf65c2f-47de-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=10438639). But I can't do it alone. So, I'll modify the question - "What are __WE__ __ going to do to ease the divisiveness in Congress?" Pete's part of the problem. I need you to be part of the solution. name: Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret.), My Faith Votes
subject: The Kamala Harris Religious Test
body:
Peter,
Before they wrote the First Amendment guaranteeing the free exercise of religion, the framers of our Constitution wrote a clause to ensure there’d never be a religious test to serve in government.
Knowing what we know about the Founders, do you think they did this to protect religion from government interference, or as a way to keep religious people out of government?
Obviously it was to protect religion from government interference, and to say otherwise is just historically ignorant.
**In light of this, I want you to be aware of what Senator Kamala Harris did to District Judge Brian Buescher during his nomination hearing last year.**
Because Judge Buscheur, a Catholic, had long been a member of the staunchly pro-life Knights of Columbus, she asked questions insinuating that he was unfit to serve on the bench.
_“Were you aware that the Knights of Columbus opposed a woman’s right to choose when you joined the organization?”_ she asked.
This behavior of Senator Harris is not only antithetical to the values of our Founders, but it’s crystal clear proof that the Left’s ideological agenda is their religion — and they will prosecute and persecute anyone that does not worship their ideals.
**I tell you this because I want to remind you how important it is for Christians to be informed and mobilized in 2020, as well as how urgently My Faith Votes needs your ongoing financial support. We’re getting very close and the stakes are getting higher.**
In November, when we vote in all 100,000 federal, state and local elections across the country, is our goal to recenter our government around God and biblical values, or to drive them further and further out of public life?
Do we want a society that rewards and looks with admiration upon men and women of faith looking to serve America, or one that vilifies and penalizes them for it?
I know what kind of America I want. It’s the one described by Vice President Pence in his recent speech at Liberty University, when he said, “I promise you, we will always stand up for the right of Americans to live, to learn, and to worship God according to the dictates of their conscience.”
**This is the America I am fighting for. It’s why I’m serving as National Spokesperson for My Faith Votes, and it’s why today, _[I’m asking for your ongoing and generous support](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200814apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200814apl01nd&n=1)._**
[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200814apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200814apl01nd&n=2)
Thank you for your time and dedication.
Sincerely,

Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret.)
National Spokesperson
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200814apl01nd&n=3)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200814apl01nd&n=4).

name: Team MJ Hegar
subject: 97,000 in two weeks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
That's how many kids tested positive for COVID-19 in the last two weeks of July alone.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e5f/7f51f7bc/435cbbc4/4ef7fa5c/2543794175/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

In just the last two weeks of July, over 97,000 children in the United States tested positive for COVID-19 -- and that's while school was out of session! Meanwhile, Sen. Cornyn was going around saying that nobody knows whether kids can get COVID-19 (**WRONG**), and kids can't die from it (**WRONG**).

How can a sitting U.S. senator not know these basic facts -- or does he just not care? Either way, Sen. Cornyn is flat-out disregarding the scientists who tell us that kids can indeed get COVID-19 and transmit it to others around them -- like teachers, parents, and grandparents. **We need new representation, and we need it _yesterday._ [Help us elect MJ Hegar, who will listen to health care professionals and do everything she can to protect our kids.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e5f/7f51f7bc/435cbbc4/4ef7fa53/2543794175/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200814.1nd__1923__&amount=10")**

MJ is a mother of two young boys. That means she's going through the challenges so many families across Texas are facing, like how to handle the school year and how to keep her loved ones safe. She's not tucked away in a fancy Washington townhouse, she's living through this, just like us.

**And when we win this election and send MJ to DC, you can bet she 's going to fight for us -- for her kids, and for all of our kids. **

**We deserve a senator who listens to scientists and health care professionals. Pitch in to elect MJ and send Sen. Cornyn packing.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani=20Brzozowski?=
subject: The Post Office is under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a67b27f0e75a/the-post-office-is-under-attack?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Donald Trump and the Republicans are waging a war on the Post Office in order to steal an election. It's easy to see why Republicans like Trump and my opponent Adam Kinzinger are willing to let the Post Office go without the funding it needs in an election year. **When access to voting is fair, Democrats win elections. Republicans are desperate and scared. **

And they have every right to be scared. From our terrific team of VP Biden and Senator Harris at the top of the ticket to our County candidates and everywhere in between, **Democrats have as strong of a field as ever and we're poised to make history this November.** We can't let Republicans get away with stealing this election.

[Click here to chip in and defeat a Trump-loving Republican. ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=2006cbd8eb&e=140a9b81e7)

Here in IL-16, Adam Kinzinger had an opportunity to vote to fund the Post Office and vote by mail back in May, and he voted against both of them. **Kinzinger knows that record turnout in this district means he's at risk of losing his seat, and he's willing to let the Post Office suffer to hold on to his power.**

Playing political games with the Post Office is shameful, even for Republicans. So many Americans rely on the Post Office for life-saving medication, and for many rural areas, the Post Office is the only service that will deliver packages and letters.

**The only way to stop Kinzinger, Trump, and the rest of the Republicans from getting their way is to beat them this November.[Can I count on you to chip in to help me unseat Adam Kinzinger?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=15e31f1181&e=140a9b81e7)**

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

| | Peter,

I’m absolutely thrilled that California’s own Kamala Harris will be the next Vice President of the United States.

Kamala has energized Democrats across the country, but we are 80 days out from the election and we need to keep up the momentum.

[**_Will you let us know that you’re all in by committing to vote this November?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18685938/236433201/938343120?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2I1YzM0MC01M2RlLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fjvjkeryIqQf-5UzIDh10-QbkjRfkPZ-IqrifKl_3WE=&emci=6035b13a-53de-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=7cb5c340-53de-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=2678920)

Peter, this is an exciting moment for all of us, but our work has only just begun. With less than 100 days until the election, we need to ensure that all voters are ready to mail in their ballots, vote early, or vote in person on election day.

[**_Stand with me and commit to vote Democrat this election day!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18685940/236433203/938343120?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDQ0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2I1YzM0MC01M2RlLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fjvjkeryIqQf-5UzIDh10-QbkjRfkPZ-IqrifKl_3WE=&emci=6035b13a-53de-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=7cb5c340-53de-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=2678920)

body:
Get in on the ground floor of this movement. |
---
Friend,

We've got a great chance at winning this race and taking control of the U.S. Senate. But to remove the likes of David Perdue and Mitch McConnell from power, we need support from everyone on this people-powered, grassroots team.

**Friend, we've noticed you haven't donated to Jon Ossoff's Senate campaign yet this month, and we're a little short of our mid-month goal.[Can you make your first donation of August to invest in Jon's movement?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2650/5b2c1286/3eff8de7/25f18e89/3251906481/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_14_fir_aug_don?refcode=em_2020_08_14_fir_aug_don")**
**Grassroots Supporter:** Prospective August donor
**Donated to Jon Ossoff this month?** Not yet!
**Suggested action:[First August donation](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2650/5b2c1286/3eff8de7/25f18e89/3251906481/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_14_fir_aug_don?refcode=em_2020_08_14_fir_aug_don")**
Jon is surging in the polls, and every day it seems a new publication upgrades Georgia to a toss-up state.

**The GOP knows they are in danger of losing Georgia, and they're spending millions in dark money to keep Donald Trump's "favorite Senator" in office.**

Jon's campaign isn't taking contributions from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists. We are relying on small-dollar contributions from people like you to fuel this grassroots movement.

**_And, unfortunately, right now we are behind where we want to be for August._**

**Right now, you have an opportunity to get in on the ground floor of the grassroots campaign that's the talk of the nation and that's going to turn the Senate blue on November 3.**

**[With 17 days left in the month, will you chip in $17 to keep our momentum going through August?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2650/5b2c1286/3eff8de7/25f18e88/3251906481/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_14_fir_aug_don?refcode=em_2020_08_14_fir_aug_don_17&amount=17")**

clean_body: Get in on the ground floor of this movement. | Friend, We've got a great chance at winning this race and taking control of the U.S. Senate. But to remove the likes of David Perdue and Mitch McConnell from power, we need support from everyone on this people-powered, grassroots team. Friend, we've noticed you haven't donated to Jon Ossoff's Senate campaign yet this month, and we're a little short of our mid-month goal. "" Grassroots Supporter: Prospective August donor Donated to Jon Ossoff this month? Not yet! Suggested action: "" Jon is surging in the polls, and every day it seems a new publication upgrades Georgia to a toss-up state. The GOP knows they are in danger of losing Georgia, and they're spending millions in dark money to keep Donald Trump's "favorite Senator" in office. Jon's campaign isn't taking contributions from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists. We are relying on small-dollar contributions from people like you to fuel this grassroots movement. And, unfortunately, right now we are behind where we want to be for August. Right now, you have an opportunity to get in on the ground floor of the grassroots campaign that's the talk of the nation and that's going to turn the Senate blue on November 3. "" | | "" | "" There's so much on the line this November. We're grateful to have you on the team. Thanks for everything, Team Ossoff | This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com "" | "" | P.O. name: Biden-Harris HQ
subject: Need your endorsement, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Now that we've announced who's on our ticket, it's time to get to work. |
---
Peter,

Joe Biden chose Kamala Harris as his running mate. When we elect both Joe Biden and Kamala Harris on November 3, we'll do what's never been done before and elect our first female vice president.

But now that we've announced who's on our ticket, it's time to get to work.

From now until November we need to show that the Biden-Harris ticket isn't just one that will make history, it's one that can win. We need your wholehearted support in this fight for the soul of our nation.

**Will you commit to electing Joe Biden and endorse the Biden-Harris ticket today?** | [ENDORSE THE TICKET >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbb9/1cd0ac28/163b7edd0/357e2203/490967754/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pet-endorse-the-ticket?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.14_B1_endorsetheticket_X__F1_S1_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.14_B1_endorsetheticket_X__F1_S1_C1__full")
---
Joe Biden chose Kamala because he knows how important this race is -- to protect our democracy, to lead by example, and to fight for our shared values.

Kamala is a fierce advocate for families in the Senate, and has committed her life to fighting for justice and making sure all Americans get a fair shot, not just a select few. We know that together, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris will fight for the soul of this nation, and Peter, they intend to win.

**So now it 's time for us to put our trust in this ticket to get to the finish line. Add your name today to endorse Joe Biden and Kamala Harris as your official Democratic ticket for 2020:**
[ENDORSE THE TICKET >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbb9/1cd0ac28/163b7edd0/357e2203/490967754/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pet-endorse-the-ticket?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.14_B1_endorsetheticket_X__F1_S1_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.14_B1_endorsetheticket_X__F1_S1_C1__full")
---
Thanks so much for your support, Peter.

Let's win this thing!

Biden-Harris HQ
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbb9/1cd0ac28/163b7edd0/357e2202/490967754/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbb9/1cd0ac28/163b7edd0/357e2201/490967754/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbb9/1cd0ac28/163b7edd0/357e2200/490967754/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbb9/1cd0ac28/163b7edd0/357e22ff/490967754/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbb9/1cd0ac28/163b7edd0/357e22fe/490967754/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbb9/1cd0ac28/163b7edd0/357e22fd/490967754/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbb9/1cd0ac28/163b7edd0/357e22fc/490967754/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbb9/1cd0ac28/163b7edd0/357e22fb/490967754/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and Kamala Harris's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbb9/1cd0ac28/163b7edd0/357e22fa/490967754/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE AND KAMALA »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbb9/1cd0ac28/163b7edd0/357e22f9/490967754/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbb9/1cd0ac28/163b7edd0/357e22fc/490967754/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbb9/1cd0ac28/163b7edd0/357e22f8/490967754/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbb9/1cd0ac28/163b7edd0/357e22fb/490967754/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbb9/1cd0ac28/163b7edd0/357e22f7/490967754/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

Biden-Harris HQ | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nancy=20Mace?=
subject: Congressman Cunningham Fact Check ❌
body:
I didn't think I'd need it, but look 📷 | | | [View In Your Browser](https://mailchi.mp/nancymace/how-we-flip-the-house-2088366?e=f1831b4ca2) [Forward To A Friend](http://us7.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=9913a4081d&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| | [](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=b07523a5e6&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| null,

I try not to take pictures next to people who can’t tell the truth.

It definitely happened recently though, and I thought I’d tell you about it now. So, I figure it's a good idea to recirculate this photo below.
---
|
---
| Why? Because Congressman Cunningham's Super PAC isn’t the only one who knows they’re lying.

Congressman Cunningham knows it, too.

This picture was taken when I stood shoulder to shoulder with Congressman Cunningham at an anti-seismic testing and anti-offshore drilling event on December 12, 2018.

You see, this week hundreds of thousands of DC dark money dollars are flooding TVs in South Carolina's First Congressional District; false TV ads alleging I am pro-offshore drilling and **lying about my record**.

Now more than ever, **I need your help to stand up to Congressman Cunningham and the shady, deceitful interests supporting him. **The truth is, I’m opposed to offshore drilling. Period.

[Here's where I've been an outspoken opponent of offshore drilling -- even when it means saying NO to my own Party.](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=2216931244&e=f1831b4ca2)

[Here's where I've been awarded a 100% Lifetime Rating with the Conservation Voters of SC.](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=866e52e3f6&e=f1831b4ca2) (Hey, Congressman Cunningham, offshore drilling proponents don't get an A+ from those folks.)

We should all tell the truth. And we should punish those who can’t or won’t.

I need to get the word out to make sure everyone knows these are lies.

The special interest group attacking me knows it. They don’t care.

**Of course this is the same DC special interest group that viciously attacked me and my family when we were home, in quarantine, sick with coronavirus. **

They are the lowest of the low.

[We quickly issued a cease and desist to put a stop to the deceitful lies spewed by out-of-state SuperPACs supporting Congressman Cunningham. ](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=c0b84c39d2&e=f1831b4ca2)

They took down the ad -- **_but now, they're back._**

I hope I can count on you to help us get the word out about these lies. This isn't how we treat people here in the Lowcountry.

Sincerely,
---
|
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=3e77b74123&e=f1831b4ca2)

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
It would be dangerous not to take this seriously.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8123%2E868730%2E02aomk) Friend, Our GOP candidate Loren Culp claims that he's the "law and order" candidate. But when it comes to enforcing laws he doesn't like, like gun safety laws that keep Washingtonians safe and alive? Well, suddenly, those enforcing them become the Gestapo. An overstatement? Not to Loren Culp: "I don't think it's overstating anything. It's showing the same thing that happens when police officers disregard citizens' rights." This is our Republican nominee for governor. If we don't take it seriously, we could have a Donald Trump clone unseat Jay -- that's why our midnight goal is very real and very important. **We set a $25,000 goal and we're just $4,567 short:[Will you donate $5 or more before midnight tonight to fight back against Jay's GOP extremist opponent?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10760?t=4&akid=8123%2E868730%2E02aomk)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10761?t=5&akid=8123%2E868730%2E02aomk)

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: I’m running for Congress to be an unapologetic fighter for bold, progressive policies.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
Getting rid of Donald Trump isn’t the end of our fight. It’s the start of our most important ones. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zdovuQh6AnzseedbOztB5U3N720NDadj7zRuigSklZR5jtHL6OaYIYnIwJxc1AeZ30gXoWX5tSJLGJ-u3zcldxLzFMj62NzOaVIGEe270h_XIzqezB0vKNoaPsO1_A2W5szq6Pf4GcAWWfXHbZ2ZGjgdp0IVDAqWMfRcqENmYf2-eZGPnz_y_YqNgXDZMvVsNcejAbTgzgl_eAi9gNct36EbEC4FeZeBZPYCuRsgkD1vybLC86iy5D64rtvk7f79eELMdbc4OKQPrUxg1i-G9fzSQ2xVkqjRKiz9e8iOVp_yoG-oFEJAnpJQYMqMt25TzPY0Xzj4M0HGGxt0zU760W9p6YilpZDIgfGupX0sv1_ilyBZyZWtc5JQiJGOLG2e1mkIopHV_sLChZGZQpre8rOQWJrrO0nT2ZCI-vR2DAN3zJeZnMO3Ckx6h10k1cQjQ/34b/0UMfzJcyQ7OJCnCOFGXzjQ/h0/EpxMLhiUpD-k9Bou3vLJo1JW2464wsgfLErG2J3p99M) Friends, It’s imperative that we take back our democracy this November. That’s why I’m doing everything I can to defeat Donald Trump, and that’s why I encourage you to do the same. Winning this election isn’t the end of the fight. It’s the start of our most important ones. If I win in November, I will be honored to join the most progressive and most diverse Congress in American history. And that’s why, once Trump is gone, our movement must fight harder than ever before for bold policies like Medicare for All and a Green New Deal. **[I’m running for Congress to be an unapologetic fighter for bold, progressive policies. If you can, please make a contribution to my campaign today to help me get there.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zdovuQh6AnzseedbOztB5U3N720NDadj7zRuigSklZR5jtHL6OaYIYnIwJxc1AeZ0QVihX4xMf2jvsFmqcTUIi_5NYkFUEwoBaRJ77tQGI8lA2j3t4B4EJ981SwHur6Ve2Q1osBcP-mzW5aSF0g9JCiRoDjFRvIETKNJ0-Vrgt3Z06mn47giQGsnPxtVC-ZI5wr-vme7PjyD6UfJfLATu-c2_d8PRg9ewAUQMq3PFLHKFj3tauxlhSF-GeYoYsZIiRGmuigvE1pu7wXQCAC-ZtNncNFQwZFDba8yV73mfTDhnHeOvoPuojtbCZEVEPI6alMMw7jxW95fuG8xFkZF5kqU_BnOyDWM2FzpqxmHZG5ive9R284no1TssBLn0LjZNxGN9FDPxf9pxv518r890y5MbZrqADbUFGV0GF-OATCHVege8Sj3D1AOalBIH_ECs/34b/0UMfzJcyQ7OJCnCOFGXzjQ/h1/-jKvuFyHkHJMStbCgqcEict5DXpc_pLyt6FHXGlCzY4)** If we want justice for our Black communities, our underserved communities, and every American who is unable to reach their full potential under the status quo, we need to broaden our imagination of what is possible. Empathy for the American people must be brought to bear. If we truly want to make a difference in the lives of working people, we need activists on the inside. That’s the attitude I’ll take to Congress. **[Taking this fight for working people to Washington will not be easy. clean_body: Getting rid of Donald Trump isn’t the end of our fight. It’s the start of our most important ones. | | | Friends, It’s imperative that we take back our democracy this November. That’s why I’m doing everything I can to defeat Donald Trump, and that’s why I encourage you to do the same. Winning this election isn’t the end of the fight. It’s the start of our most important ones. If I win in November, I will be honored to join the most progressive and most diverse Congress in American history. And that’s why, once Trump is gone, our movement must fight harder than ever before for bold policies like Medicare for All and a Green New Deal. If we want justice for our Black communities, our underserved communities, and every American who is unable to reach their full potential under the status quo, we need to broaden our imagination of what is possible. Empathy for the American people must be brought to bear. If we truly want to make a difference in the lives of working people, we need activists on the inside. That’s the attitude I’ll take to Congress. To steal a line from my sister-in-action, Congresswoman Ayanna Pressley, I’m all in on removing the Occupant of the White House and replacing him with an administration that we can work with to enact our progressive agenda. Let’s work together to win this election, but we cannot hang up our hats once we have a new President. I will not rest until working people have a fighting chance. Onward, Mondaire Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Our mailing address is: Mondaire for Congress P.O. Box 933, Nyack, NY 10960 | | | | Sent via . name: Allen Chen
subject: Strategy Memo (Top Supporters List)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Friend, we wanted you to be the first to know: We launched the next phase of expanding our campaign to bring real leadership to TX-22 and scaled up the spread of our message.

Our Mail Fund will ensure that we engage with new communities -- and we want you to be a founding part of this new initiative because you’re one of our top supporters. Chip in $5 or whatever you can to become one of the founding donors of our new Mail Fund.

Become a founding donor, friend!

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CONTRIBUTE $5 » https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?express_lane=true&refcode=em_fr_2020.08.14_b1_ac_all&amount=5
CONTRIBUTE MORE » https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.14_b1_ac_all&amount=25

In 2018, we employed a strategy that got us closer than any Democrat had in history to flipping TX-22 blue.

We engaged new communities in rapidly diversifying neighborhoods and turned out a swath of new voters -- and it took a strong organizing program to do that. But because of the pandemic, our organizing team has had to adapt and plans have changed.

That doesn’t mean our strategy can’t prioritize community engagement this time around, friend. We’re developing mailers and utilizing new supporters to help us spread the message to even more communities, because we know that the road to winning lies through building an even broader, even more diverse coalition.

We’re excited to launch our new Mail Fund, but we need your help to get there.

Because you're on of our top supporters, we're asking: Chip in $5 or whatever you can now.

Become a founding donor, friend!

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CONTRIBUTE $5 » https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?express_lane=true&refcode=em_fr_2020.08.14_b1_ac_all&amount=5
CONTRIBUTE MORE » https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.14_b1_ac_all&amount=25

Thank you,
Allen

Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our COVID-19 community resource guide [https://sri2020.com/covid-19-community-resources/] to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe.

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.

Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.14_b1_ac_all&amount=25

Bringing true representation to TX-22. https://sri2020.com/

Paid for by Sri for Congress
SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]
If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/770855f7-55de-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb/ab0b4813-63de-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjBiNDgxMy02M2RlLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SQJlCDmy4aG6ov1Sg-qzsOfu0JWbFg_02GfPiEjp3PA=&id=117373579 .

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: CONTRIBUTE $5 » CONTRIBUTE MORE » In 2018, we employed a strategy that got us closer than any Democrat had in history to flipping TX-22 blue. We engaged new communities in rapidly diversifying neighborhoods and turned out a swath of new voters -- and it took a strong organizing program to do that. But because of the pandemic, our organizing team has had to adapt and plans have changed. That doesn’t mean our strategy can’t prioritize community engagement this time around, friend. We’re developing mailers and utilizing new supporters to help us spread the message to even more communities, because we know that the road to winning lies through building an even broader, even more diverse coalition. We’re excited to launch our new Mail Fund, but we need your help to get there. Because you're on of our top supporters, we're asking: Chip in $5 or whatever you can now. Become a founding donor, friend! If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: CONTRIBUTE $5 » CONTRIBUTE MORE » Thank you, Allen Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas. Please visit our COVID-19 community resource guide [] to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe. Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ Bringing true representation to TX-22. Paid for by Sri for Congress SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#] If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Mark Warner HQ
subject: Trump's voter suppression strategy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

**Mark Warner 's Republican opponent Daniel Gade is joining Donald Trump in sowing misinformation about voting by mail.** And make no mistake about it: This is an effort to make it harder for folks to vote, especially since we're still in the middle of a pandemic. He's made unsubstantiated accusations about voting by mail at least twice already. **[Can you chip in now to help re-elect Mark Warner?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db49/53d9897e/543fe5c3/1c882c50/352021118/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcwNyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-gade?refcode=20200814_f_1_nd__707__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")** As coronavirus cases continue to rise in Virginia and across the country, experts agree that voting by mail offers a safe and secure way to participate in elections without risking the spread of COVID-19. Earlier this year, Virginia passed a law allowing no-excuse absentee voting. That means that everyone has the ability to vote by mail in the November 3rd election if they choose.

Even though Daniel Gade has repeatedly parroted Donald Trump's false claims that voting by mail is fraudulent, it seems he's saying one thing but doing another. **Ahead of the June primary, his campaign website featured a form for Virginians to request their mail-in ballot to cast their vote for Gade.**

It's clear that Daniel Gade will _not_ represent our best interests in Washington. We need to send Mark Warner back to the Senate so he can continue to work for _all_ Virginians -- and be honest about his priorities with them. **[If you're able, will you pitch in now to help send Mark back to the Senate?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db49/53d9897e/543fe5c3/1c882c5f/352021118/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcwNyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-gade?refcode=20200814_f_1_nd__707__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

Thank you,

Team Warner

Peter -- please don't ignore this! Susan needs YOU!
In this past month alone, the Far Left has invested more money into the state of Maine than we have EVER seen before. From Chuck Schumer to Elizabeth Warren, elites on the Far Left are spending MILLIONS in Maine to see Susan defeated in November. **They have made Maine the MOST expensive Senate race in the country.**

name: Maggie Thomas, Evergreen Action
subject: You're invited: Biden's climate plan + BYOB
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Your exclusive Biden climate briefing, but with beverages.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=2161%2E53494%2EvyT4V1) Friend, The Democratic National Convention kicks off Monday! To get in the party spirit, I'll be hosting a live, opening-night happy hour with two ~~fellow nerds~~ very special guests. We're calling it **Policy + Pints** \-- and you're invited to our EXCLUSIVE1 live pre-DNC briefing on Joe Biden's climate plan (but with beverages, obviously). **[Will you join us on Monday, August 17 at 8:30 p.m. ET / 5:30 p.m. PT?](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/750?t=3&akid=2161%2E53494%2EvyT4V1)** | [REGISTER ON ZOOM ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/750?t=4&akid=2161%2E53494%2EvyT4V1)
---
Think of **Policy + Pints** as a virtual BYOB2 happy hour with me, Leah Stokes, Julian Brave NoiseCat, and climate activists from all over the country. Leah and Julian are two of Evergreen's advisory board members, and they know more about climate policy and activism than just about anyone. (In fact, you've probably seen their names in your inbox. See, it's like you're already friends!)
**[Join us Monday, August 17 at 8:30 p.m. ET / 5:30 p.m. PT as we crack open a beer (or whatever's your beverage of choice!), look under the hood of the Biden-Harris climate plan (from policy experts who advised on it), and share our hopes for the convention.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/750?t=5&akid=2161%2E53494%2EvyT4V1)**
We'll wrap up by 9 p.m. ET / 6 p.m. PT so we can all catch the convention's opening speeches, including remarks from Former First Lady Michelle Obama and Senator Bernie Sanders.
Monday's event won't be the only **Policy + Pints** night, but it will be the first3 \-- and ~~it might get a little weird~~ it will definitely go off without a hitch.
Hope to see you there!
Maggie Thomas
Political Director, Evergreen Action
[REGISTER ON ZOOM ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/750?t=6&akid=2161%2E53494%2EvyT4V1)
---
1 Disclaimer: Actually not exclusive at all. Please forward this invite to any friends and family!
2 Bring your own beer, bring your own red carpet, bring your own press badge...
3 After all, you only get to live out your fantasy of attending an official, exclusive pre-convention virtual happy hour once in your life!
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=2161%2E53494%2EvyT4V1). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---

name: True the Vote
subject: True the Vote Weekly Update Aug 7 - Aug 14
body:
A weekly wrap up of all things election integrity
| | | | |
---
| | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=101A150A14A1013)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | WHAT HAPPENED THIS WEEK

Americans know our electoral process is a sacred privilege. Yet, so many loopholes exist in our election laws which leave plenty of room for abuses of our voting system come election day. That's why we're seeing election fraud across the country play out in real time – mass mail failures, bogus voter registrations which lead to bogus votes, process subversion, disallowing citizen participation, outside intervention... It's outright chaos.

We are taking the most sacred franchise offered to an American – the right to a free and fair vote of their voice, their will, for their government – and throwing every monkey wrench that we can grab into this process. It defies logic. It makes one question motive. More than anything, it underscores the need for citizens to wake up and engage. This runaway train is not going to stop itself.

As we approach early voting and Election Day this November, we the people have to educate and prepare ourselves to protect our ballot box in this election cycle, or we will risk losing it forever. What is the one thing that can change the dynamic?

It is citizen engagement.
Onward,
Catherine

---
| |
---
|
---
| | CATCH OUR LATEST PODCAST EPISODES OF RED, WHITE, & TRUE
---
| | | | |
---
| | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=101A150A14A1031)
---
| | | THIS WEEK | EPISODE 13 | How to Spot Fraud in the 2020 Election w/ Catherine [WATCH NOW >](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=101A150A14A1032)
Subscribe to the podcast today to get notice as soon as new episodes post. [Apple | Spotify | You Tube ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=101A150A14A1014)

PREVIOUS EPISODES:
EPISODE 12 | November is Coming... [WATCH NOW >](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=101A150A14A1036)
EPISODE 11 | The Truth About Soros, BLM, and Elections. [WATCH NOW > ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=101A150A14A1015)
Episode 10 | TX Attorney General Ken Paxton [WATCH NOW > ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=101A150A14A1016)
Episode 9 | Debbie D’Souza [WATCH NOW > ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=101A150A14A1017)
Episode 8 | Citizen Watchdog Colleen Vera [WATCH NOW > ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=101A150A14A1018)
Episode 7 | Dinesh D'Souza [WATCH NOW > ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=101A150A14A1019)

To see all previous episodes please visit [here](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=101A150A14A1031).

---
| | |
---
| |
---
|
---
| | TAKE ACTION

Here are three things you can do to get in the fight....

****1.[ Empowering Citizens](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=101A150A14A1033) There is a huge need for more information on how citizens can get involved in local elections, but not all counties have the same processes. It can be challenging to figure out how to serve. True the Vote is crowdsourcing local information about how to become an election worker through the Call Your County project. As information comes in, we validate and post it online in a shareable format to make it easier for citizens to get involved in their local election process.

2\. [Launching New Online Training Resources](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=6c430890f027b48ed94d0e7563714e56&i=96A141A21A954) True the Vote is launching new training programs through our Knowledge Network to equip citizens to serve as election workers and to expose and deter election fraud. Check out the [Election Observer Basic Training](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=6c430890f027b48ed94d0e7563714e56&i=96A141A21A954), [Election Integrity 101](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=6c430890f027b48ed94d0e7563714e56&i=96A141A21A954), [Poll Watcher Training](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=6c430890f027b48ed94d0e7563714e56&i=96A141A21A954), and [Signature Verification Training](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=6c430890f027b48ed94d0e7563714e56&i=96A141A21A954).

3\. [Recruiting & Enrolling](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=6c430890f027b48ed94d0e7563714e56&i=96A141A21A959) The 2020 general election is in 81 days. Through Mobilize a Million, True the Vote is actively working to recruit and enroll citizens to serve at the polls during early voting and on Election Day. Election worker positions include: presiding and alternate judges who manage the poll books and issue ballots; election clerks and greeters who assist the judges; early voting ballot board members; signature verification committee members; and central counting station personnel.

There is a huge need for more information on how citizens can get involved in local elections, but not all counties have the same processes. It can be challenging to figure out how to serve. True the Vote is crowdsourcing local information about how to become an election worker through the Call Your County project. As information comes in, we validate and post it online in a shareable format to make it easier for citizens to get involved in their local election process. 2\. True the Vote is launching new training programs through our Knowledge Network to equip citizens to serve as election workers and to expose and deter election fraud. Check out the , , , and . 3\. The 2020 general election is in 81 days. Through Mobilize a Million, True the Vote is actively working to recruit and enroll citizens to serve at the polls during early voting and on Election Day. name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: Senate Update: Fighting for real relief now
body:
| | | [Click here to open this e-mail in its own browser window](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?link=SenVanHollen%2501146330%2501100476%2b-%2b08-14-2020%2beNewsletter%250115475.19108536.4772913.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501) | [Click here to open a plain text version of this email](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?plain_text=Y&link=SenVanHollen%2501146330%2501100476%2b-%2b08-14-2020%2beNewsletter%250115475.19108536.4772913.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501)
---|---
| | | **August 14, 2020** |
---|---|---|---
| | | American workers and families are hurting, our small businesses are desperately trying to stay afloat, and communities across the country are struggling. Three months ago, the House of Representatives passed another round of comprehensive emergency legislation, called the Heroes Act, to address both the health and economic impacts of the pandemic. Despite our repeated efforts, Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell has refused to even allow a vote on that bill. Instead, he has sent Senators back to their home states and told them to be on standby for a possible vote on a deal. That is irresponsible. [As I said on the Senate Floor this week](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15475.19108536.4772913.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fnews%2fpress-releases%2fvan-hollen-trumps-executive-actions-are-inadequate-and-unworkable-americans-need-real-relief-now&redir_log=963501272771047), the coronavirus pandemic is not taking a day off and neither should the Senate. That is not the kind of leadership our country needs during a crisis that has caused recession-era unemployment levels. In fact, McConnell has said that many Republican Senators think we have already passed enough relief. That's also why the Trump Administration walked away from the negotiating table, because they knew that if they reached a deal, the majority of Republicans in the Senate would likely oppose it. This is not the way to conduct the Senate and it puts Americans and our economy dangerously at risk. Instead of working with Democrats and Republicans alike to reach a bipartisan deal, the President opted for show over substance. He released a series of inadequate and unworkable executive actions that don't seriously address the health and economic crises facing our country. For example, what he heralded as an "eviction moratorium" is nothing more than a directive to federal agencies to "consider" the issue. His executive gimmicks don't include critical provisions from the House-passed Heroes Act - including those to help schools reopen safely, expand real-time testing, support struggling child care providers, provide food and rental assistance for those who are struggling, send critical resources to the Postal Service, support state and local governments whose needs have only risen dramatically, and so much more.

We all know the virus doesn't care if you live in a red state or blue state. This is a red, white, and blue moment. We must treat it as a national effort, which means the White House and Republican Leader McConnell need to come to the table and negotiate in good faith. We need to work together to do something meaningful. The virus isn't taking a vacation; the economic recession isn't taking any time off. Neither should we. We must hammer out a deal that helps the American people and our economy weather this storm.
---
### Protecting Our Mail
I have heard from many of you who are experiencing mail delays - including for essential mail such as medication and retirement checks. I want to be clear: the current slowdown in mail delivery is unacceptable and is imposing unnecessary hardship on Marylanders and communities nationwide. These problems are driven by the pandemic and recent changes implemented by the new Postmaster General - and Trump campaign contributor and ally - Louis DeJoy, and they must not be allowed to continue.

That's why I've called for an immediate reversal of these changes and am working in the Senate to open an investigation, provide emergency funds to the Postal Service, and fight against any efforts to privatize it. My office has also reached out to our local post offices to investigate and get details on their operations. As Americans continue to rely on USPS, and especially since millions plan to exercise their right to vote by mail in November, we cannot let these problems persist.

Americans deserve to know that when they post their ballot or pay a bill by mail, it will be delivered on time. They should have peace of mind knowing their fundamental right to have their voice heard in our government has been fulfilled. While we push for these changes at the Postal Service, it's critical that every Marylander knows how to safely cast their ballot this fall - including by [early voting, which starts on October 26](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15475.19108536.4772913.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.wbaltv.com%2farticle%2fmaryland-board-of-elections-early-voting-dates-approved%2f33586633&redir_log=88062655496642).
### Getting Into Good Trouble
Last week, we marked the 55th anniversary of the Voting Rights Act (VRA) being signed into law. This historic piece of legislation passed nearly five months after civil rights hero and my friend John Lewis was beaten bloody in Selma marching for the right to vote. He was always getting into "good trouble" because he believed our country could create a more perfect union. John was willing to put his life on the line to ensure that every American could cast a ballot, participate in our democracy and change our country for the better. I will never forget traveling with John on three civil rights pilgrimages to Selma, Alabama, each time with one of my children. We marched with him, arm in arm, across Selma's Edmund Pettus Bridge (which I hope will be renamed in honor of John Lewis).

But the landmark Voting Rights Act came under attack seven years ago with the _Shelby County v. Holder_ decision, when the Supreme Court, in a 5-4 decision, gutted a key provision and opened the flood gates for increased voter suppression - especially against communities of color. Now, we have reintroduced and renamed the bill to restore the VRA to its full promise - the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act. The House passed it almost immediately. It's time for Senate Republicans to turn their oral tributes to John into action in the Senate chamber. He showed us all the power of collective action and true courage to bend the arc of the moral universe toward justice - and in order to fully honor his legacy, we must take action to protect the fundamental right to vote.

Shortly before he passed, John Lewis penned a letter to all Americans marching in the streets across the country in the name of equality and justice, encouraging us all to keep up the fight. The letter reads, "While my time here has now come to an end, I want you to know that in the last days and hours of my life you inspired me. You filled me with hope about the next chapter of the great American story when you used your power to make a difference in our society." John never backed down from getting into "good trouble" to stand up for what is right.

I implore my colleagues on the other side of the aisle in the Senate to listen to John's words - and to finally act. It's long past time for the Senate to also stand up for what is right - to rise to the moment, answer the call of the people, and use its power to make a difference in our society. We have much more work ahead of us to address the systemic racism and inequality in many parts of our society - and while voting rights is a key part of that, we must do much more. Among the many additional measures we must enact is the Justice in Policing Act, which passed the House more than a month ago. It will help hold police accountable to the communities they serve, ban abusive practices, ensure transparency and reporting of misconduct, and end virtual immunity from lawsuits. McConnell must allow a vote on it immediately - ensuring liberty and justice for all cannot wait and should not be a partisan issue.
### Keep Speaking Up
Americans have a right to free speech. And exercising that right is a core principle of our democracy. I hope all of you will continue to stay engaged and make "good trouble." I hope you will continue to seek out ways to let your voices be heard - whether that's by [sharing your thoughts with your Congressional representatives](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15475.19108536.4772913.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fcontact&redir_log=475918421268285) or ensuring you know [how to participate in our elections this fall](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15475.19108536.4772913.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2felections.maryland.gov%2f&redir_log=644688930203218). Together, we must continue striving to build a more perfect union.

Chris Van Hollen
P.S. Don't forget to [fill out the 2020 Census](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15475.19108536.4772913.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fmy2020census.gov%2f&redir_log=574467404893169)!

clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | | August 14, 2020 | ---|---|---|--- | | | American workers and families are hurting, our small businesses are desperately trying to stay afloat, and communities across the country are struggling. Three months ago, the House of Representatives passed another round of comprehensive emergency legislation, called the Heroes Act, to address both the health and economic impacts of the pandemic. Despite our repeated efforts, Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell has refused to even allow a vote on that bill. Instead, he has sent Senators back to their home states and told them to be on standby for a possible vote on a deal. That is irresponsible. , the coronavirus pandemic is not taking a day off and neither should the Senate. That is not the kind of leadership our country needs during a crisis that has caused recession-era unemployment levels. In fact, McConnell has said that many Republican Senators think we have already passed enough relief. That's also why the Trump Administration walked away from the negotiating table, because they knew that if they reached a deal, the majority of Republicans in the Senate would likely oppose it. This is not the way to conduct the Senate and it puts Americans and our economy dangerously at risk. Instead of working with Democrats and Republicans alike to reach a bipartisan deal, the President opted for show over substance. He released a series of inadequate and unworkable executive actions that don't seriously address the health and economic crises facing our country. For example, what he heralded as an "eviction moratorium" is nothing more than a directive to federal agencies to "consider" the issue. His executive gimmicks don't include critical provisions from the House-passed Heroes Act - including those to help schools reopen safely, expand real-time testing, support struggling child care providers, provide food and rental assistance for those who are struggling, send critical resources to the Postal Service, support state and local governments whose needs have only risen dramatically, and so much more. We all know the virus doesn't care if you live in a red state or blue state. This is a red, white, and blue moment. We must treat it as a national effort, which means the White House and Republican Leader McConnell need to come to the table and negotiate in good faith. We need to work together to do something meaningful. The virus isn't taking a vacation; the economic recession isn't taking any time off. Neither should we. We must hammer out a deal that helps the American people and our economy weather this storm. Protecting Our Mail I have heard from many of you who are experiencing mail delays - including for essential mail such as medication and retirement checks. I want to be clear: the current slowdown in mail delivery is unacceptable and is imposing unnecessary hardship on Marylanders and communities nationwide. These problems are driven by the pandemic and recent changes implemented by the new Postmaster General - and Trump campaign contributor and ally - Louis DeJoy, and they must not be allowed to continue. That's why I've called for an immediate reversal of these changes and am working in the Senate to open an investigation, provide emergency funds to the Postal Service, and fight against any efforts to privatize it. My office has also reached out to our local post offices to investigate and get details on their operations. As Americans continue to rely on USPS, and especially since millions plan to exercise their right to vote by mail in November, we cannot let these problems persist. Americans deserve to know that when they post their ballot or pay a bill by mail, it will be delivered on time. They should have peace of mind knowing their fundamental right to have their voice heard in our government has been fulfilled. While we push for these changes at the Postal Service, it's critical that every Marylander knows how to safely cast their ballot this fall - including by . Getting Into Good Trouble Last week, we marked the 55th anniversary of the Voting Rights Act (VRA) being signed into law. This historic piece of legislation passed nearly five months after civil rights hero and my friend John Lewis was beaten bloody in Selma marching for the right to vote. He was always getting into "good trouble" because he believed our country could create a more perfect union. John was willing to put his life on the line to ensure that every American could cast a ballot, participate in our democracy and change our country for the better. I will never forget traveling with John on three civil rights pilgrimages to Selma, Alabama, each time with one of my children. We marched with him, arm in arm, across Selma's Edmund Pettus Bridge (which I hope will be renamed in honor of John Lewis). But the landmark Voting Rights Act came under attack seven years ago with the Shelby County v. Holder decision, when the Supreme Court, in a 5-4 decision, gutted a key provision and opened the flood gates for increased voter suppression - especially against communities of color. Now, we have reintroduced and renamed the bill to restore the VRA to its full promise - the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act. The House passed it almost immediately. It's time for Senate Republicans to turn their oral tributes to John into action in the Senate chamber. He showed us all the power of collective action and true courage to bend the arc of the moral universe toward justice - and in order to fully honor his legacy, we must take action to protect the fundamental right to vote. Shortly before he passed, John Lewis penned a letter to all Americans marching in the streets across the country in the name of equality and justice, encouraging us all to keep up the fight. The letter reads, "While my time here has now come to an end, I want you to know that in the last days and hours of my life you inspired me. You filled me with hope about the next chapter of the great American story when you used your power to make a difference in our society." John never backed down from getting into "good trouble" to stand up for what is right. I implore my colleagues on the other side of the aisle in the Senate to listen to John's words - and to finally act. It's long past time for the Senate to also stand up for what is right - to rise to the moment, answer the call of the people, and use its power to make a difference in our society. We have much more work ahead of us to address the systemic racism and inequality in many parts of our society - and while voting rights is a key part of that, we must do much more. Among the many additional measures we must enact is the Justice in Policing Act, which passed the House more than a month ago. It will help hold police accountable to the communities they serve, ban abusive practices, ensure transparency and reporting of misconduct, and end virtual immunity from lawsuits. McConnell must allow a vote on it immediately - ensuring liberty and justice for all cannot wait and should not be a partisan issue. Keep Speaking Up Americans have a right to free speech. And exercising that right is a core principle of our democracy. I hope all of you will continue to stay engaged and make "good trouble." I hope you will continue to seek out ways to let your voices be heard - whether that's by or ensuring you know . Together, we must continue striving to build a more perfect union. Chris Van Hollen P.S. Don't forget to ! "Facebook" "Twitter" "Instagram" "YouTube" |

| Patriot,
Deep State actors have been out to get President Trump since Day 1. Andrew McCabe, Jim Comey, and James Clapper have engaged in leaking classified information, making false statements to Congress, lying on search warrants in order to investigate the President's 2016 campaign, and otherwise interfering in our elections.
The question is: why haven't they been prosecuted?
