Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2ea/18e32a7f/4dd262f4/7b2119b6/1458053143/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2ea/18e32a7f/4dd262f4/7b2119b7/1458053143/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2ea/18e32a7f/4dd262f4/7b2119b4/1458053143/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2ea/18e32a7f/4dd262f4/7b2119b0/1458053143/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2ea/18e32a7f/4dd262f4/7b2119b2/1458053143/VEsHAg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b2ea/18e32a7f/4dd262f4/7b2119b5/1458053143/VEsHDQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

body:
The general election is LESS THAN 3 MONTHS AWAY.

|

[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e58/7f51f7bc/43535aae/4ef7fa9b/970266856/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

We've got to:
* Raise the resources necessary to reach every voter we need to take on Sen. Cornyn. **[Will you help out?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e58/7f51f7bc/43535aae/4ef7fa9a/970266856/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200814.2nd__1900__&amount=10")**
* Reach out to the **millions of undecided voters** who haven't heard of MJ yet.
* Ensure that swing voters know just how terrible Sen. Cornyn has been for Texas and how he has always put his big donors' interests above ours.
* Boost turnout in key regions across the state.

We're doing everything we can to defeat Sen. Cornyn this November, but with so little time left, we all need to buckle down and give this race everything we can.

**Will you pitch in to help MJ win just under three months from now?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Tom Cotton
subject: My Response to Chinese Sanctions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
Peter, As one of my most loyal supporters, I wanted to make sure you saw my response to the Chinese Communist Party regarding their recently announced sanctions against me. Check out my Fox News editorial and thank you for your continued support.Click here to unsubscribe http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=43201991&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMTE5NTc4OAS2&mt=1&rt=0
http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMyMDE5OTES1&kn=6&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTgyMTE5NTc4OAS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter,
As one of my most loyal supporters, I wanted to make sure you saw my response to the Chinese Communist Party regarding their recently announced sanctions against me.

Check out my Fox News editorial and thank you for your continued support.

-Tom
China’s Foreign Ministry announced Monday that it will sanction me and 10 other Americans, including three of my Senate Republican colleagues, for supposedly “behav[ing] badly on Hong Kong-related issues."

These toothless sanctions won’t have much effect on me, but that’s because they were never about me in the first place. They’re meant to scare potential critics of the Chinese Communist Party into shameful silence and even complicity. The message is clear: the Party is always watching and ready to punish its enemies.

Sadly, we know that scare tactics and threats can silence even powerful people, especially those who are financially compromised by China. That’s why you won’t see supposedly “progressive” executives and superstars in the NBA denouncing China’s forced labor and other human-rights abuses.

Thankfully, not everyone is so craven.

If the CCP thinks it can shut down all its critics with threats alone, it has another thing coming, because we’ll never stop fighting to defend the many victims of Chinese Communism.

These victims include Jimmy Lai, the pro-democracy media entrepreneur in Hong Kong who was arrested earlier this week as part of the CCP’s broader crackdown on protestors and the free press under a new national security law.

Lai and the journalists at his publication, Apply Daily, reported honestly on the CCP’s takeover of the city, under the pretext of national security. Now they’re paying the price, as the CCP locks them up alongside countless other political prisoners.

But the crackdown in Hong Kong is just the most visible of the CCP’s abuses, because—for now—it still has a free press.

Less visible, but no less important, are the Uighurs in Xinjiang who’ve been herded into concentration camps for “re-education” and subjected to forced sterilization and abortions in order to suppress minority birthrates. Or the Tibetans who serve as the CCP’s test subjects for new methods of surveillance and repression.

Here at home, the CCP’s victims include hundreds of thousands of dead Americans who overdosed on fentanyl made in loosely regulated Chinese superlabs; their fatal doses, and the grief of their loved ones, can be traced back to China and its cynical leaders who allow these drug rings and the carnage they cause to continue.

But the CCP’s victims also include the hundreds of thousands of Americans who’ve suffered and died from the Wuhan virus that it unleashed on the world after a massive coverup. And they include the millions of workers who were laid off after their factories shut down, either because they were moving to China or because they were bankrupted by China’s predatory trade practices and technology theft.

Like all communist regimes, CCP rule has meant misery, suffering, and death for its own subjects.

This is as true today as it was during the man-made famines of the Great Leap Forward, the Maoist struggle sessions of the Cultural Revolution, and the Tiananmen Square Massacre. But now the CCP is exporting this misery to people around the world as its leader, Chairman Xi Jinping, abandons the patient strategy of his predecessors in a mad rush for power.

The CCP’s ultimate goal is to crush its competitors and extend a high-tech tyranny—or “socialism with Chinese characteristics”—around the globe.

The CCP’s global ambitions and the crimes it has committed to advance them are now plain as day. The Free World, led by the United States, already is starting to fight back with sanctions of our own against the officials and companies that are carrying out the CCP’s agenda.

That’s why the Party is lashing out now to suppress its critics. But these scare tactics are doomed to fail. The CCP’s crimes are too great, and the friends of freedom too many, to be suppressed for long.

If the Chinese Communists think we’ve “behaved badly” so far by opposing their tyranny, I have two words for them: just wait. Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
Suite 200
Little Rock, AR 72202

Senator Cotton was honorably discharged from the U.S. Army. Images do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or any service branch.

Privacy Policy http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMyMDE5OTES1&kn=2&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTgyMTE5NTc4OAS2&mt=1&rt=0
Unsubscribe http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=43201991&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMTE5NTc4OAS2&mt=1&rt=0

name: SERIOUS [via Jon Ossoff HQ]
subject: Social security
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Jon's opponent wants to gut it. |
---
Friend,

This week, as we mark the 85th anniversary of the Social Security Act, President Trump issued an Executive Order _putting Social Security funding in JEOPARDY_!

**If Senator David Perdue had his way, he'd gut Social Security and other essential benefits.**

_Perdue has worked for years to _put Social Security funding on the chopping block_ , he supported a plan to _slash Medicare funding by nearly $500 billion_ , and he wants to _raise the retirement age_._

**Perdue wants to put benefits for Georgia seniors at risk.**

**[Democrat Jon Ossoff will defend Social Security and Medicare, and right now he's NECK and NECK in the polls with Perdue. Will you chip in $10 right now to make sure Jon beats Perdue?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e260d/5b2c1286/3ee37a63/25f18a26/1994024617/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_14_soc_sec?refcode=em_2020_08_14_soc_sec&amount=10")**
| | [Chip in $10 to elect Jon!](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e260d/5b2c1286/3ee37a63/25f18a26/1994024617/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_14_soc_sec?refcode=em_2020_08_14_soc_sec&amount=10")
---
Friend, we've squandered trillions of dollars on needless wars, bank bailouts, and tax cuts for the wealthiest Americans -- then we're told there's no money for health care, Social Security, and other critical benefits.

Perdue has said in the past, in regard to Social Security, "we cannot afford the commitments that we've been making." _But three years ago, he was happy to support the GOP's massive tax cut for corporations that could mean future Social Security cuts._

**The only reason Social Security is in any danger is because it is being relentlessly attacked by Republicans like Perdue.**

**_When they say we can't afford to fund Social Security, THEY ARE LYING._**

And it's not just working-class seniors whom Perdue doesn't care about; in the middle of an economic crisis, _he led the charge to cut unemployment benefits and opposes stimulus checks_.

**David Perdue doesn't care about benefits that protect the livelihood of millions of his constituents. He only cares about the financial interests of the corporations that bankroll his campaign.**

We need to elect new leaders like Jon Ossoff who will protect these benefits -- and vote out self-serving politicians like Perdue.

**[Today, on the anniversary of President Franklin D. Roosevelt signing the Social Security Act into law, will you defend Social Security by supporting Jon Ossoff's campaign to send David Perdue into retirement?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e260d/5b2c1286/3ee37a63/25f18a29/1994024617/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_14_soc_sec?refcode=em_2020_08_14_soc_sec")**

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

One (1) winner will receive round-trip transportation and accommodations for two (2) to attend a meal event featuring President Donald J. Trump to be identified by Sponsor (approximate retail value $3000). The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit here for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 725 Fifth Ave, New York, NY 10022 Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee.

name: KAMALA (ME)2
subject: Exposing Kamala
body:
Joe Biden made his unsurprising announcement that Kamala Harris will be his Vice Presidential running mate.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-388455-915721-5142956-a0efa45d05-5524a490cb)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-388455-915721-5142956-a0efa45d05-5524a490cb) Joe Biden made his unsurprising announcement that Kamala Harris will be his Vice Presidential running mate.

I’ve dealt with Kamala Harris and exposed her blatant political corruption back in 2017 as an investigative journalist.

Of course, the Mainstream Media didn’t run with the story at the time so let me tell you a bit about what I uncovered.

In October of 2016, Trump supporter and activist, Mark Feigin was arrested and charged by then California Attorney General Kamala Harris for making “criminal threats” and “annoying phone calls” to an Islamic Center.

It turns out, Feigin didn’t make the calls, but I found out who did, and I published the police interviews that took place with the real culprit.

Despite Mr. Feigin being TOTALLY cleared of the false accusations, Kamala wouldn’t stop and demanded he sign a plea agreement that required 5 years of formal probation, and community service that would be SUPERVISED BY A MUSLIM GROUP.

Kamala Harris also demanded that Mark Feigin **denounce the “Alt-Right” even though he was never associated with it**.

**That’s right, Kamala Harris demanded a U.S. Citizen denounce beliefs after falsely charging him with a hate crime.**
Kamala is the poster child of political corruption and with her elevation to the #2 most powerful Democrat in the nation, you can rest assured that AOC, Ilhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib and every other power-hungry Democrat in Congress will emulate Kamala’s model to use the government against political adversaries.

**And I plan on being in Congress in 2021 to stop them.[Help me get there today.](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-388455-915721-5142956-a0efa45d05-5524a490cb)**

We’re days away from Primary Day in Florida and my eyes are set on the General Election and meeting our fundraising goals to win in November.

We have $36,725 left to raise before Primary Day. [**Will you chip in $10 today and ask a friend to do the same?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-388455-915721-5142956-a0efa45d05-5524a490cb)

Our General Election media blitz needs to be funded with a war chest to compete against my Democrat opponent and any amount you can donate will help us get there. [**Chip in $10, $20 or whatever you can afford.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-388455-915721-5142956-a0efa45d05-5524a490cb)

Kamala Harris will be the new corrupt “attack dog” of the Left as Joe Biden can’t even string along a sentence and she’ll spawn a dozen wannabe’s in Congress who will be hell-bent on destroying or silencing any conservative who challenges them.

But they’ve tried that with me . . . for years.

They failed, I’m still here and they know that when they send their attack dogs after me, **they’re the ones who get bitten**.

[**Send me to Washington by donating today.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-388455-915721-5142956-a0efa45d05-5524a490cb)

Thank you again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

Photo Credit: Gage Skidmore
---

720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-388455-915721-84585d41bbe610b-5524a490cb)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: A new Republican mayor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/statewide-airwaves-469642?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| **_A New Republican Mayor_** In the heart of Lake County, we saw some big news this week -- and a big message sent to Democrats not just here, but around the country.

Longtime **Hobart Mayor Brian Snedecor **made the decision to leave the Democrat Party and officially become a Republican this week. He made the call after watching his former party continue to move further and further to the left -- staking their ground on issues like raising taxes, opening our borders, eliminating private health insurance, and defunding the police.

A special thank you goes out to **Dan Dernulc, Dana Dumezich,** and **Mike Simpson** for your leadership in Lake County and the 1st District and role in this announcement.

**Mayor Snedecor** said it perfectly, “The efforts of the progressive left have driven many people, moderates and conservatives, away from the Democratic Party."

It's a trend we're continuing to see, with more Hoosiers stepping up and saying that today's Democrats aren't the same Democrats we saw even a generation ago. Democrats are on a radical leftward shift, and Hoosier voters have clearly spoken that Democrats no longer speak for them.

**Mayor Snedecor's** decision this week expands the Republican majority of mayoral seats to 71 statewide -- more than any party has ever held at one time in state history.

While Democrats go further into the fringes, here in Indiana, Republicans will continue to lead and deliver results. \- Chairman Kyle Hupfer
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9c559024f3&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_Gov. Holcomb's Commitment to K-12 Education_** Across the state, Hoosier students are back in school. And whether that school is in-person, virtual or a hybrid of the two, **Governor Holcomb** is [committed to making sure that Indiana's schools receive 100% of their funding](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c47d65e4be&e=1acd9bb3d6) \-- providing some consistency and certainty for our students, parents and teachers. This includes a $182 million scheduled budget increase for K-12 schools in 2021.

This will be achieved by pushing back the official count of student enrollment to at least December, with the Indiana General Assembly returning for its annual session in January to continue the conversation.

**Governor Holcomb** has made his commitment to our state's K-12 schools clear, continuing his track record of:
* Grants for high-quality Pre-K available in every county
* A historic $1.6 billion in new education funding since 2017
* 98% of Indiana school corporations reporting an increase in teacher pay last year with **Governor Holcomb** paying of a teacher pension liability
* PPE available to every Indiana district before school officially started
* Continual guidance from the Indiana State Department of Health

To stay up to date on the latest developments, please make sure you're following** Governor Holcomb** on [Facebook](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=69e7495d43&e=1acd9bb3d6), [Twitter](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=27faa69293&e=1acd9bb3d6) and [Instagram](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4b3c1cb207&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

| _**This Saturday Will Be Super**_ We’re just 81 days from Election Day, and those 81 days are critical. We're talking with voters, sharing our message, and putting in the hard work it takes to elect Republican leaders statewide.

Tomorrow is our next Super Saturday.** ** We'll be talking with voters about the election in November, and the reasons why it's critical we support our Republican team up and down the ballot,_ _ starting with **President Trump, Vice President Pence, Governor Holcomb, Lt. Governor Crouch, **and **Republican AG nominee Todd Rokita!**

[Sign up](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f52e4d1a4e&e=1acd9bb3d6) below and a member of our team will reach out to you with details!
** ** [**\-- > Click here to sign up for our Super Saturday event <\--**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1476c3305d&e=1acd9bb3d6)

| _**Victoria Spartz Has the Momentum!**_ Some big news this week out of the 5th District! A new poll from the Club for Growth shows that **Victoria Spartz** has taken [a seven-point lead ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0cb662c8c9&e=1acd9bb3d6)in the district's congressional race. She's the voice we need in Washington to stop Nancy Pelosi and regain control of the House.

[Read more about the poll here.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5081c4204a&e=1acd9bb3d6)

| _**Todd Rokita Travels the State**_ Even through a pandemic, **Todd Rokita** is barnstorming the state! He recently attended Lincoln Day Dinners at both ends of Indiana \- St. Jospeh County and Clark County.

Keeping the attorney general's office in conservative hands is vital this November, and **Todd Rokita **will always stand up for and defend conservative values and the rights of all Hoosiers.

Make sure you're following him on [Facebook](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bf2d6b23bd&e=1acd9bb3d6) and [Twitter](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1917f7c489&e=1acd9bb3d6) to stay up do date with his campaign!

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Questions?
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
During [yesterday's conversation with Dr. Fauci](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ajKZ8TpqS_SMW5Lu_W86w-LRTnzDKLArgLY8AC6MBEPuNjas2Oi8TsdDFnRRNoTjjKiEYXORMUwhwy602h-j-6K7XndpgXSWaCH59n2Wd69-6YKwZxCpDhJUxCaBliZKNrgOi1B5_o8YiW4v1AqR7qI0T7vO2r9JtqJ7FONXSlNFvYWNeYXZ5Q==&c=n3QVI8dG5puV42GBq1sMBGPxf9FDEDWzQ8dt0HeywUFui2ICmaYIng==&ch=f1TcKek_ojTCa2IANJ5BMZWJQcXLegAeR2fWD6MmVzm69fbuW-kcxQ==), we touched several times on the importance of in-person schooling for our children's mental health. I know that's an important subject for many of you as well - we received quite a few questions about it last week. Today, I'd like to ask for your help again in choosing the questions to ask next week's experts.
Next Thursday, for our weekly Facebook Live forum, I'll be joined by Jennifer W. Jencks, PhD, LICSW, Director of the Access Center at Bradley Hospital and Assistant Director of Lifespan Pediatric Behavioral Health Emergency Services. I'll also be joined by Barbara Austin, LICSW, Bradley Access Center Supervisor. Our conversation will focus on how we can support students' mental health and well-being as they return to school this fall. If you have a question you'd like me to ask during the Zoom, please respond to this email with it.
Last week we got over 500 questions and it was a huge success. I want these forums to reflect the concerns and questions of all Rhode Islanders. Thank you so much for your help! We're all in this together,
-Gina Raimondo Governor
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ajKZ8TpqS_SMW5Lu_W86w-LRTnzDKLArgLY8AC6MBEPuNjas2Oi8Tnkdamh6pIoqbKt0jrfpSWhxbBRcT6jzOIL-ifYJdDV2vT2vOzy8o__fmVZHdcPzsdmFv4Ha5_9_n1JSQHNBZhUe1Uu9IAUwf2HvGSzEOEKWOckx2tT_5SYSdSN-CIu0M2CcZJ8LOoHqdwpuiMpyoas=&c=n3QVI8dG5puV42GBq1sMBGPxf9FDEDWzQ8dt0HeywUFui2ICmaYIng==&ch=f1TcKek_ojTCa2IANJ5BMZWJQcXLegAeR2fWD6MmVzm69fbuW-kcxQ==)

body:
but you can make a difference
|

With l _ess than three months_ until Election Day, we need to reach as many voters in the Triad as possible.
And with _less than three days_ until the last mid-quarter deadline of the election cycle, I need to ask you to step up if you're able to do so.

Thank you,
Kathy

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Five Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want You to Miss
body:
Thursday’s announcement of a ‘historic peace agreement’ between Israel and the United Arab Emirates is more evidence that President Trump is the first | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dc047c5052&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**Israel-UAE Agreement Shows Trump’s Middle East Policy Succeeding**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8c8063a5d7&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“Thursday’s announcement of a ‘historic peace agreement’ between Israel and the United Arab Emirates—the first deal to normalize relations between Israel and an Arab nation brokered by the U.S. in over a quarter-century—is more evidence that President Trump is the first president in a long time to get U.S. Middle East policy more right than wrong,” writes James Jay Carafano, a foreign policy expert at the Heritage Foundation.

🎬 **WATCH:**[**President Trump announces Israel-UAE deal in Oval Office**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=de95c7bc97&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Governors Can’t Use Coronavirus to Indefinitely Declare a State of Emergency**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3c1ddb8668&e=3ee4985eea)
_-The Federalist_
“In a moment of national panic, Americans permitted their state and local executives to take power—to declare states of emergency and to implement lockdowns—and now those executives won’t give that power back,” Molly McCann writes. “Our current quandary is that governors are using COVID as an excuse to extend their authority indefinitely.”
---
|
---
| [**Trump Is Giving Schools Tools to Reopen, and They Must Do So for Children's Sake**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f8e4ee1116&e=3ee4985eea)
_-Washington Examiner_
“For our children's sake, we must reopen schools for in-person learning. President Trump’s new ‘Kids First’ plan will help enable school districts to do just that,” Kevin Roberts writes. Leading voices, such as the American Academy of Pediatrics, “are coming together in agreement: These indefinite school closures are hurting our children.”

**LEARN MORE:**[**President Trump supports safely reopening schools**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0ec5beb10c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**It's Time to Hire American**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2d7c2891ad&e=3ee4985eea)
_-RealClearPolicy_
“President Trump recently suspended the entry of some guest workers into the United States. And he ordered federal officials to stop issuing green cards for the rest of the year, with limited exceptions. These are bold first steps towards halting the massive, harmful influx of foreign labor into the United States”—especially important to get more Americans back to work as we reopen from the pandemic, Marie Larson writes.
---
|
---
| [**Now There's No Denying It: Obama's FBI Spied On Trump... Period**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6bd41e3dfc&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Townhall_
News broke today that former FBI lawyer Kevin Clinesmith is expected to plead guilty to falsifying documents as part of the FBI’s surveillance of the Trump campaign in 2016. “If you are conducting surveillance that is not authorized and, in fact, you lied to get the authorization . . . You are spying,” Larry O’Connor writes.

name: Kathy Manning
subject: August 24th: Save the Date!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
RSVP Today!
|
---

| | Good afternoon, I hope you will join me in supporting Chief Justice Cheri Beasley by attending an event we are co-hosting for her on Monday, August 24th at 6:00 PM. Chief Justice Beasley has proven herself to be a remarkable jurist who is non-partisan, fair-minded, and has led the court ably through this pandemic.
As the first African-American woman to lead our North Carolina Supreme Court, Chief Justice Beasley brings her unique life experience as well as many years as a public defender, district court judge and court of appeals judge, to the bench.
[**We were proud to see Chief Justice Beasley featured in an article in the New York Times about the need for criminal justice reform.**](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d289/3d199a51/2fae8a91/7364ab4b/1394053946/VEsH/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://www.nytimes.com/2020/06/16/opinion/state-supreme-courts-racial-justice.html?searchResultPosition=1") Chief Justice Beasley's re-election is critically important, as the leader of the North Carolina Supreme Court she sets the tone of the court and serves as an example to the other Justices. We need her leadership during these difficult times. We look forward to seeing you on August 24th! Sincerely, Kathy [](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d289/3d199a51/2fae8a91/7364ab48/1394053946/VEsE/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "http://www.chiefjusticebeasley.com/aug24")
[**Click here to RSVP.**](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d289/3d199a51/2fae8a91/7364ab48/1394053946/VEsF/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "http://www.chiefjusticebeasley.com/aug24") **For more information contact Sean@KathyManningForNC.com** |

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Democrats’ School Choice Conundrum, HCQ works, and Biden finally has his running mate
body:
**[Web version](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/m/1/49109489/02-b20227-907826c8baa043cebc65c909877dbb0f/78/827/b8e62181-232e-454e-8556-00cec36f0519)** Say what you will about the Democrats’ insistence on keeping the schools closed. They at least deserve credit for being consistent in their hostility to school choice – no matter the circumstance... When we've argued for school choice in the past, Democrats and corrupt teachers' unions have insisted that school choice, in any form, would hurt students, taxpayers, and the public school system. Now that we are arguing for the choice to attend in-person classes, based on the science saying that the risk of death or hospitalization for children with the virus is minimal, they insist again that this form of school choice would hurt students, taxpayers, and the public school system. If anything is certain, it is that Democrats' ignorance to the facts and reality of the situation is consistent. [Our Co-Founder Jenny Beth Martin broke down the Democrats' school choice conundrum in her latest op-ed.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjI3LTkwNzgyNmM4YmFhMDQzY2ViYzY1YzkwOTg3N2RiYjBm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90b3duaGFsbC5jb20vY29sdW1uaXN0cy9qZW5ueWJldGhtYXJ0aW4vMjAyMC8wOC8xMi90aGUtbGVmdHMtc2Nob29sLWNob2ljZS1jb251bmRydW0tbjI1NzQxOTY_bWlkPTQyNTI2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=1Iv1T4smZI_lJSh2QYVExg) [ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjI3LTkwNzgyNmM4YmFhMDQzY2ViYzY1YzkwOTg3N2RiYjBm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90b3duaGFsbC5jb20vY29sdW1uaXN0cy9qZW5ueWJldGhtYXJ0aW4vMjAyMC8wOC8xMi90aGUtbGVmdHMtc2Nob29sLWNob2ljZS1jb251bmRydW0tbjI1NzQxOTY_bWlkPTQyNTI2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=cesASCDV6hj0HN7GBUJ2LQ) **[The Left’s School Choice Conundrum](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjI3LTkwNzgyNmM4YmFhMDQzY2ViYzY1YzkwOTg3N2RiYjBm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90b3duaGFsbC5jb20vY29sdW1uaXN0cy9qZW5ueWJldGhtYXJ0aW4vMjAyMC8wOC8xMi90aGUtbGVmdHMtc2Nob29sLWNob2ljZS1jb251bmRydW0tbjI1NzQxOTY_bWlkPTQyNTI2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=LBzDg9TOtVMT4roTVXAooQ)**
The verdict is in. Online, distance-learning programs failed on a grand scale to provide quality education to students all across the globe in the spring. That’s precisely why most European countries abandoned the online classrooms and went back into the real classrooms. **[Read more...](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjI3LTkwNzgyNmM4YmFhMDQzY2ViYzY1YzkwOTg3N2RiYjBm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AVGhlIExlZnTigJlzIFNjaG9vbCBDaG9pY2UgQ29udW5kcnVtP21pZD00MjUyNiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=zUMAN2QfigbjfzQk5czegQ)** | |
---
This week we continued the fight to keep big government bureaucrats out of your personal healthcare decisions.

For the last few weeks, we have been fighting off the disinformation from Democrats, their propaganda network (the Mainstream Media) and Big-Tech. All of which have been insisting, without evidence, that Hydroxychloroquine is not a valid treatment for the coronavirus -- and therefore, they believe should be banned as a treatment.

Despite the fact that [a Professor of Epidemiology](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjI3LTkwNzgyNmM4YmFhMDQzY2ViYzY1YzkwOTg3N2RiYjBm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbmV4YW1pbmVyLmNvbS9vcGluaW9uL2h5ZHJveHljaGxvcm9xdWluZS13b3Jrcy1pbi1oaWdoLXJpc2stcGF0aWVudHMtYW5kLXNheWluZy1vdGhlcndpc2UtaXMtZGFuZ2Vyb3VzP21pZD00MjUyNiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=5AoDCM_zzuT6US-50yPy9w) at Yale School of Public Health, [a sitting Congressman](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjI3LTkwNzgyNmM4YmFhMDQzY2ViYzY1YzkwOTg3N2RiYjBm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGhlZ2F0ZXdheXB1bmRpdC5jb20vMjAyMC8wOC93aXRob3V0LWRvdWJ0LWh5ZHJveHljaGxvcm9xdWluZS1wcm90b2NvbHMtaGVscGVkLXN5bXB0b20tZnJlZS00LWRheXMtY29uZ3Jlc3NtYW4tbG91aWUtZ29obWVydC1zcGVha3MtYm91dC1jb3ZpZC0xOS8_bWlkPTQyNTI2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=A7rR0SthQY1y29G4oOtHoQ) and many others have verifiably demonstrated that it is indeed a potentially valid treatment, Democrats unfounded insistence has been incessant.

We will continue to fight their disinformation and stand for your right to decide, with your doctor, what treatment works best for you.
|
---

[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjI3LTkwNzgyNmM4YmFhMDQzY2ViYzY1YzkwOTg3N2RiYjBm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucGF0cmlvdHByb2plY3QuY29tL2NvbnNlcnZhdGl2ZS1tb20td2hvLWNvbmZyb250ZWQtYmV0by1vcm91cmtlLWJlYXRzLWxvbmd0aW1lLWluY3VtYmVudC1pbi1ob3VzZS1wcmltYXJ5Lz9taWQ9NDI1MjYmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=6_8c78Uy-ywT4Zj3y4w7YA)

**[Conservative Mom Who Confronted Beto O’Rourke Beats Longtime Incumbent in House Primary](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjI3LTkwNzgyNmM4YmFhMDQzY2ViYzY1YzkwOTg3N2RiYjBm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucGF0cmlvdHByb2plY3QuY29tL2NvbnNlcnZhdGl2ZS1tb20td2hvLWNvbmZyb250ZWQtYmV0by1vcm91cmtlLWJlYXRzLWxvbmd0aW1lLWluY3VtYmVudC1pbi1ob3VzZS1wcmltYXJ5Lz9taWQ9NDI1MjYmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=4jt1LleEbA3f77JAuSZ6tg)**
Lauren Boebert, whose forthright defense of the Second Amendment at a rally for former Democratic presidential candidate Beto O’Rourke brought her national attention, won a Republican congressional primary in Colorado. **[Read more...](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjI3LTkwNzgyNmM4YmFhMDQzY2ViYzY1YzkwOTg3N2RiYjBm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucGF0cmlvdHByb2plY3QuY29tL2NvbnNlcnZhdGl2ZS1tb20td2hvLWNvbmZyb250ZWQtYmV0by1vcm91cmtlLWJlYXRzLWxvbmd0aW1lLWluY3VtYmVudC1pbi1ob3VzZS1wcmltYXJ5Lz9taWQ9NDI1MjYmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=UTt62M5yimUjH0yJ4yHQRQ)**
|
---
This week Joe Biden finally emerged from the basement to announce whom his campaign had selected to be his running mate. Much to Biden's surprise, they chose Senator Kamala Harris, who had just completed her own disastrous and failed attempt to run for President. And in the process of doing so, she had disparaged Joe Biden, inferring that he was racist and guilty of sexual assault.

Yet, despite this, she agreed to join his Presidential ticket as his VP candidate. Meaning one of two things is true: either power corrupts or she didn't believe any of it in the first place. Which of these it is, the world will never know...

But, nevertheless, Joe Biden's running mate is now officially Kamala Harris, and the media is working overtime to paint her as a “moderate.” Their job is going to be tricky, though, because on one hand, she painted herself as a “law and order” District Attorney and Attorney General, and now... the Democrats hate law enforcement.

On the other hand, she is as radical as any of the rabid left on every issue from taxes, to “climate change,” to health care, immigration and border security, and on and on. Oh, and now she sides with violent rioters, calling them, “a coalition of conscience.”

Americans need to know what they’re really getting with a Biden/Harris ticket.
|

All of which have been insisting, without evidence, that Hydroxychloroquine is not a valid treatment for the coronavirus -- and therefore, they believe should be banned as a treatment. Despite the fact that at Yale School of Public Health, and many others have verifiably demonstrated that it is indeed a potentially valid treatment, Democrats unfounded insistence has been incessant. We will continue to fight their disinformation and stand for your right to decide, with your doctor, what treatment works best for you. | Lauren Boebert, whose forthright defense of the Second Amendment at a rally for former Democratic presidential candidate Beto O’Rourke brought her national attention, won a Republican congressional primary in Colorado. | This week Joe Biden finally emerged from the basement to announce whom his campaign had selected to be his running mate. Much to Biden's surprise, they chose Senator Kamala Harris, who had just completed her own disastrous and failed attempt to run for President. And in the process of doing so, she had disparaged Joe Biden, inferring that he was racist and guilty of sexual assault. Yet, despite this, she agreed to join his Presidential ticket as his VP candidate. Meaning one of two things is true: either power corrupts or she didn't believe any of it in the first place. Which of these it is, the world will never know... But, nevertheless, Joe Biden's running mate is now officially Kamala Harris, and the media is working overtime to paint her as a “moderate.” Their job is going to be tricky, though, because on one hand, she painted herself as a “law and order” District Attorney and Attorney General, and now... the Democrats hate law enforcement. On the other hand, she is as radical as any of the rabid left on every issue from taxes, to “climate change,” to health care, immigration and border security, and on and on. Oh, and now she sides with violent rioters, calling them, “a coalition of conscience.” Americans need to know what they’re really getting with a Biden/Harris ticket. | Just two years ago, Harris and DeGeneres had a good, hearty laugh about potentially doing away with Donald Trump — or Mike Pence, or Jeff Sessions. | |

name: Jon (iPhone)
subject: What Trump's doing to the Postal Service
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Our republic in on the line, friend |
---
Hey Friend -- it's Jon Ossoff.

**Donald Trump is openly saying he wants to deny the Postal Service funding so it can't process mail-in ballots during a pandemic!**

President Trump: _"Now they [Democrats] need that money in order to make the post office work so it can take all of these millions and millions of ballots ... But if they don't get those two items that means you can't have universal mail-in voting."_

**Friend, the President is now shamelessly undermining the Postal Service to disenfranchise voters during the pandemic.**

_A pandemic that his total incompetence has allowed to kill Americans at massive scale and devastate our economy!_

**He literally admitted he opposes USPS funding because he wants to undermine mail voting.**

**And my gutless opponent, Sen. David Perdue, is refusing to denounce Trump's outrageous assault on our democracy.**

Here's the deal, friend: We need to do *everything* we can to get neighbors, friends, coworkers -- everyone!!! -- to vote this November.

**This is the most important election of our lifetime, and we MUST WIN IN A LANDSLIDE.**

**That's why my team is building a juggernaut ballot access program to protect Georgians' voting rights this fall.**

**[So, friend, I'm asking -- in the urgent defense of voting rights -- can you chip in any amount RIGHT NOW to our Voter Protection Fund?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2606/5b2c1286/3ee52389/25f19532/203249433/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_14_usps_vpf?refcode=em_2020_08_14_usps_vpf")**
| | [Donate to Jon Ossoff for Senate!](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2606/5b2c1286/3ee52389/25f19532/203249433/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_14_usps_vpf?refcode=em_2020_08_14_usps_vpf")
---
Friend, the Postal Service isn't meant to be a political institution.

Undermining its integrity not only hurts our democracy but also dismantles its ability to deliver prescription drugs, Social Security checks, and other vital services to rural communities across our country.

**We have to call this what it is, friend -- Donald Trump knows the people have no confidence in him, and he'll lose a fair vote. So he's trying to steal this election by interfering in the election process.**

**This is an emergency.**

Senator David Perdue swore an oath to the Constitution and the people of Georgia, not to President Trump.

_If my opponent allows the President to sabotage voting by mail during this pandemic, history will condemn him for disenfranchising his own constituents and enabling an outrageous attack on the democratic process._

**But my opponent obviously doesn't care about history's judgement, or he wouldn't be such a gutless puppet of a man like Donald Trump.**

**[We simply MUST vote them out of office with overwhelming turnout. Please support our efforts to make these critical investments to win in November by chipping in NOW>>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2606/5b2c1286/3ee52389/25f19532/203249433/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_14_usps_vpf?refcode=em_2020_08_14_usps_vpf")**

body:
I'm a firm believer in grassroots power, and I know this is how we're going to beat Donald Trump. |
---
Peter, I'm so excited to share this update with you. We hit our 3 million grassroots donor milestone!

I want to give a special thank you to all of the folks who stepped up to make it happen. I know I speak for everyone on Team Joe when I say we're incredibly grateful for their support. | [](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_august_nd?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.14_B4_scroll_X__F1_S1_C1__ND_T1&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.14_B4_scroll_X__F1_S1_C1__ND_T1")

[**Peter, will you join these new members of our grassroots donor team by making your first $5 donation today? Click here to chip in.**](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_august_nd?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.14_B4_scroll_X__F1_S1_C1__ND_T1&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.14_B4_scroll_X__F1_S1_C1__ND_T1")
I'm a firm believer in grassroots power, and I know this is how we're going to beat Donald Trump. Trump may have the RNC money machine on his side, but we've got folks like the ones you see listed here who took a powerful step in helping us win this race.

And they couldn't have chosen a better time to give. Trump's team dealt us a huge blow when they outraised us last month -- and that's all money they can use to drown out our message.

**So, while I 'm grateful for everyone who has stepped up so far, I'm also speaking directly to you today when I say we need your help now more than ever, Peter.**

We cannot afford to be outraised or outspent, and frankly, we still need a huge number of folks to make their first donation if we hope to beat Trump's totals this month.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbcd/1cd0ac28/163293770/357e286f/3565703475/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and Kamala Harris's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbcd/1cd0ac28/163293770/357e286e/3565703475/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE AND KAMALA »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbcd/1cd0ac28/163293770/357e286d/3565703475/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbcd/1cd0ac28/163293770/357e2870/3565703475/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbcd/1cd0ac28/163293770/357e286b/3565703475/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.

"" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Thanks so much, Peter. We really can't do this without you. Elana Firsht Online Fundraising Director Biden for President | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

name: Team Warren
subject: Help elect more Warren Democrats:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
The next few months of campaigning will determine the future of our country for generations. We can't leave anything to chance. | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525030/45c30650/1c2c386a3/66e80c1e/2544614462/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
In the past few months, Elizabeth has endorsed waves of Warren Democrats running in big races across the country.

And grassroots supporters like you have jumped into the fight:

1. This team has already gotten organized to help elect Warren Democrats like Jamaal Bowman and Mondaire Jones.

2. Next Tuesday, three more candidates endorsed by Elizabeth will be on the primary ballots in Florida.

3. And before this November, we've got a lot of work to do to elect even more champions for working people across the country.

**We need to win the White House with Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, take back the Senate, expand our House majority, flip state houses, and elect local leaders like district attorneys who will reimagine our criminal justice system.

But it's only possible with a huge, fully funded grassroots movement, and that depends on grassroots donors like you.**

[If you can make a donation at this time, will you chip in $2 or whatever makes sense to help elect Democrats like Elizabeth in 2020 and beyond?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525030/45c30650/1c2c386a3/66e80c00/2544614462/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWp1bDIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVTA1Rl9FR1JfR1JNX1RfMjAyMDA4MTRfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-jul20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU05F_EGR_GRM_T_20200814_V1S1_P")

Elizabeth has endorsed nearly 100 candidates who are fighting to make government work for working people.

They've covered incredible ground already, and now they're running full speed ahead to win this November.

But running for office in the middle of a public health crisis looks a lot different from how campaigns typically go. It requires pioneering new outreach strategies -- and that takes a lot of resources. Grassroots donors like you have the power to help fund these innovative campaign approaches and lead progressive champions to victory.

As a team, we'll keep organizing at the grassroots level to put more Democrats like Elizabeth into office across the country.

But to make it happen, we'll need to keep asking strong supporters like you if you can help fund our critical outreach.

The next few months of campaigning will determine the future of our country for generations. We can't leave anything to chance.

[If you're able to, please make a contribution today to help elect Warren Democrats across the country.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525030/45c30650/1c2c386a3/66e80c00/2544614462/VEsEDQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWp1bDIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVTA1Rl9FR1JfR1JNX1RfMjAyMDA4MTRfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-jul20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU05F_EGR_GRM_T_20200814_V1S1_P")

Thanks for everything,

Team Warren

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: USPS sabotage (fight back)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
#
Team,
Over the past few days, we have seen continued attacks on the U.S. Postal Service from the Trump Administration -- including cutting overtime hours, authorizing delays in delivery, and removing longtime USPS executives from their positions when their leadership is needed most.
Make no mistake: we are in the middle of a pandemic and we need a strong postal service in order to conduct a safe election in November. This sabotage at the USPS is a clear attempt to undermine our vote-by-mail efforts in an attempt to help the GOP's prospects in this election.
**[I'm fighting in the Senate for our postal service during this critical moment. But with these new obstacles to mail-in voting, our Democratic candidates need a surge of support to help fight back. Will you pitch in $5 now?](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409d9042/4fbb2af3/2138449a/5e804fcb/966817259/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoWW5CaFoyVWdmWDA9IjoianItMjAwODEzLXVzcHNzYWJvdGFnZSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZW0yMDA4MTNpXzQ1NTMiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-200813-uspssabotage?refcode=em200813i_4553&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Democrats are on the verge of taking back the Senate from Mitch McConnell and the GOP -- and I'm doing everything we can to support all of our Democratic challengers and incumbents.
But it's going to take all hands on deck to beat these voter suppression efforts in key states and ensure we are electing enough Democrats to win back control of the Senate in this election.
**[We need you in the fight. Can you rush in a $5 donation now?](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409d9042/4fbb2af3/2138449a/5e804fcb/966817259/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoWW5CaFoyVWdmWDA9IjoianItMjAwODEzLXVzcHNzYWJvdGFnZSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZW0yMDA4MTNpXzQ1NTMiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-200813-uspssabotage?refcode=em200813i_4553&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you,
Jacky

****[Contribute](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409d9042/4fbb2af3/2138449a/5e804fcb/966817259/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoWW5CaFoyVWdmWDA9IjoianItMjAwODEzLXVzcHNzYWJvdGFnZSIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZW0yMDA4MTNpXzQ1NTMiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-200813-uspssabotage?refcode=em200813i_4553&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")****

body:
Peter,

Thanks for taking the time to sign up and join Team Gimenez!

We are fighting to bring back common sense leadership to South Florida and get Congress back to work for YOU.

You’ll be hearing from our team members soon but in the meantime be sure to add our contact information to your address book to stay up to date with the latest updates from Team Gimenez.

Talk to you soon,
Team Gimenez

|
| | This weekend, we have our August Weekend of Action — our coordinated (and virtual) effort to reach as many voters as we can before Election Day.

You see, with less than **3 months until the election** , it’s critical that we work every day to engage with Michigan voters. We’ve done a great job so far, but the closer we get to November 3rd, the more we rely on your help to spread our message.

**And to keep up our efforts, we’re relying on grassroots supporters like you to help us put resources into events like this weekend’s to achieve our ultimate goal of flipping this seat.**

clean_body: | | | This weekend, we have our August Weekend of Action — our coordinated (and virtual) effort to reach as many voters as we can before Election Day. You see, with less than 3 months until the election , it’s critical that we work every day to engage with Michigan voters. We’ve done a great job so far, but the closer we get to November 3rd, the more we rely on your help to spread our message. And to keep up our efforts, we’re relying on grassroots supporters like you to help us put resources into events like this weekend’s to achieve our ultimate goal of flipping this seat. | If you’ve stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | | Folks, we’ve seen time and again that Tim Walberg can sit back and count on special interest dark money to fund his campaign. But that’s not us. While he’s busy obstructing transparency and focused on pleasing his Washington insider friends, we’ve done the work here on the ground. We’ve talked to Michiganders about the changes they want to see in Washington. And, with your help, we can be that change. But that means we have to engage with as many voters as we possibly can in the coming days and weeks — and that costs money. Thank you so much for being on this team — together, we can flip this seat! Gretchen Driskell P.S. There’s still time to join our Weekend of Action — Paid for by Gretchen Driskell for Congress Gretchen Driskell is running for Congress in Michigan's 7th district against incumbent Tim Walberg. As a nonpartisan mayor, Gretchen had to balance the budget, make tough decisions, and deliver results for people in our community. name: Powered By People (BetoORourke.com)
subject: Taking advantage of this moment
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

We're now just about at the halfway point of August, and the Democratic
National Convention kicks off on Monday. The clock is ticking for us to
reach out to Democratic voters in Texas before the November election and
encourage them to take to the polls to vote for Democrats up and down the
ticket.

Research shows that consistent outreach is the number-one way to get
people to take action. And with the Democratic National Convention now
fast approaching, this November is top of mind for many folks.

Now, it's on us to take advantage of this moment and remind people why
their vote matters, especially during this election year. That's why we're
asking you for 90 minutes of your time before the convention coverage
begins to make calls with Beto and other Powered by People volunteers.
Will you join us?

Upcoming events:
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-contact-phone-bank_attend/34398?source=ema20200814-101342&t=1001&akid=101342%2E444211%2E2OtPPI ]Virtual Phone Bank with Beto
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-contact-phone-bank_attend/34398?source=ema20200814-101342&t=1002&akid=101342%2E444211%2E2OtPPI ]Monday, August 17, 6:30-8:00 pm CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-contact-phone-bank_attend/34398?source=ema20200814-101342&t=1003&akid=101342%2E444211%2E2OtPPI ]Get more info or RSVP »

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-contact-phone-bank_attend/34399?source=ema20200814-101342&t=1004&akid=101342%2E444211%2E2OtPPI ]Virtual Phone Bank with Beto
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-contact-phone-bank_attend/34399?source=ema20200814-101342&t=1005&akid=101342%2E444211%2E2OtPPI ]Wednesday, August 19, 6:30-8:00 pm CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/event/voter-contact-phone-bank_attend/34399?source=ema20200814-101342&t=1006&akid=101342%2E444211%2E2OtPPI ]Get more info or RSVP »

This election is too important and the stakes are too great for us to not
do everything we can in order to win. How we do in November — especially
in Texas — can mean the difference between the start of our nation's
healing from the last four years or another four years of Trump and his
racist policies.

Victory is within our reach — and there's never been a better time to
bring more people on board with our mission. All we need from you is a
couple hours of your time this upcoming week to help us get one step
closer.

See you on the dialer,

The Powered by People team

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1007&akid=101342%2E444211%2E2OtPPI

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

name: Amanda, MJ Hegar HQ
subject: "Mission Accomplished"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Sen. Cornyn is patting himself on the back.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e2b/7f51f7bc/43567a56/4ef7ff82/1993039891/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Big news, Peter -- after seeing MJ closing the polling gap to just one point, Sen. Cornyn released his first television ad of the general election. In it, he talks about reopening schools safely -- which is pretty rich coming from the guy who **spread blatant disinformation about reopening schools, claiming "We still don't know whether children can get [COVID-19] and transmit it to others" and "No one under the age of 20 has died of the coronavirus."**

**Nearly 100,000 kids tested positive for COVID-19 in the last two weeks of July.**

Sen. Cornyn is launching "mission accomplished" ads instead of _doing his job_ and making sure our kids, their families, teachers, and school staff are safe from COVID-19. He actually left Washington for a month-long recess, despite the ongoing national crisis made worse because of his failure to lead!

This is personal to MJ, who has two little boys, including one who's just starting kindergarten. **We need elected officials who we can trust to keep our kids safe.[Will you help elect MJ, a leader who will do whatever it takes to keep all of our kids healthy?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e2b/7f51f7bc/43567a56/4ef7ff81/1993039891/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5NDYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200814.3nd__1946__&amount=10")**

We don't need a senator who pats himself on the back as millions of children are put at risk.

**Hold Sen. Cornyn responsible. Send him on a permanent vacation by electing MJ Hegar this November.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Peter, can I count on you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Wow. That's all I can say. |
---
Peter --

Wow. That's all I can say. It's been three days since Joe asked me to join him as his running mate, and they have been incredible.

I had my first grassroots fundraiser with Joe on Wednesday night, and hearing from grassroots supporters like you filled me with hope. To see how many people are standing with Joe and me was incredible, and Peter, I promise not to let you down.

Because there is so much on the line in this election. And as Joe says, it's about fighting for the soul of this nation. From now until November 3, I will do everything I can to earn the vote of Americans across the country.

And Peter, I hope you'll be by my side. I see you haven't chipped in yet to become a Founding Donor of the Biden-Harris ticket yet. A donation of $5 is all it takes! [Can I count on your support today?](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_kdhjrb_foundingdonor?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.13_B3_kdh-fd_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.13_B3_kdh-fd_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

America is crying out for leadership, yet we have a president who cares more about himself than the people who elected him -- a president who is making every challenge we face even more difficult to solve.

Right now, America needs action. In the midst of a pandemic, Donald Trump is trying to rip health care away from those who need it most.

America is in crisis, and I know Joe Biden will lead us out of it. But first, he needs your support to get to the White House.

[So Peter, chip in to become a Founding Donor to the Biden-Harris campaign today >>](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_kdhjrb_foundingdonor?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.13_B3_kdh-fd_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.13_B3_kdh-fd_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS")

Thank you for your support,
Kamala

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Join Our Small Business Advisory Board Today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
**Join The Team Hunt Small Business Advisory Board**

If you own or operate a small business in Harris County, we invite you to join the Team Hunt Small Business Advisory Board. This group of Houston-based entrepreneurs is committed to supporting Wesley's candidacy in Texas' 7th Congressional District and collaborates with Wesley to build real-world responses to the challenges and opportunities facing Houston small businesses.

_**We invite you to join our Small Business Advisory Board today!**_

If you would like to participate or would like more information, please contact our Political Director at chris@wesleyfortexas.com.

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=c32c21d235b9494e962b17942ec5e8e3&_e=EJGhjg5pMVd-5PH7UfUPCgiFdqw2Ny1ZH2Z5t6DiQ57AcXgda0o5NVzno8511E6hHUH9Zs_zfFSPuyinKCRI8wWgJgxIxHhME2piroDjqX3d4Y3bWf9gdbFS7Iumkschvvsy-Hh4jUTMr46ibF1XuUiLnEyZkCW335v4tF4Ui5Em1KzE-jg_YpoJVWKlNGLtWFEUvvmdM3fAVzsfEWZVvL9JkaUaLNOCqS00GK2rLzuk7zXzIhosCWVd87seqss0WLKS5HKzUCaXrNgNbkUl8bG-iTXsNLWi-bJGoZPwTk8%3D)****

subject: Trump and McConnell are shaking in their boots
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
We need to keep up this momentum! |
---
Friend,

**Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell are shaking in their boots when they look at what is happening in Georgia.**

Just this week, two new polls came out with Jon Ossoff either beating or statistically tied with David Perdue.

**Friend, this race is a toss-up, and Jon has all the momentum.**

The GOP is afraid of our grassroots movement! _They know how essential Georgia is to keeping their Senate majority -- so they are spending TENS of MILLIONS to save Trump's "favorite Senator."_

**But friend, right now, we are behind on our August fundraising goal, and we need your help to make sure we stay on track to win.**

Jon is not taking any contributions from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists, so we are relying on your small-dollar contributions to fuel this grassroots campaign.
